title: My guy Dave — buying tickets, calling out the avoidance, the Gavin situation
html:
My guy Dave — buying tickets, calling out the avoidance, the Gavin situation

Source: 2021-07-29 Apple Note. Single ~70-word draft message to "Dave" — Yahir buying tickets for something tonight, naming that Dave is overwhelmed and avoidant, demanding face-to-face contact tomorrow (or tonight), and flagging "the Gavin situation" as a separate thing they need to talk about.

TL;DR

  • Drafts a tough-love message to Dave (single mention this slice; queued to Potential Entities — likely a Grants Pass / pre-OSU friend).
  • Yahir eats the financial risk ("I will buy the tickets tonight. There is a possibility that they go to waste") to force the meeting — the cost is the leverage.
  • Names the avoidance directly: "please just face whatever void and be transparent" — Yahir already articulating the emotional honesty demand he applies to friends years before he applies it to himself in therapy.
  • Flags "the Gavin situation" as a separate B-side topic — Gavin queued to Potential Entities; relationship to Dave unclear (mutual friend, conflict subject, opportunity?).
  • Captures the late-July 2021 transitional moment — three weeks before Yahir leaves Grants Pass for OSU freshman year. Last-call check-ins to high-school-era friends.

Pattern observed

Yahir's recurring "I will pay the cost to force the meeting" move shows up again here. Same structure as the Dutch Bros resignation and the FBA / Albertsons / SBA paperwork family-coordination notes — Yahir chooses to absorb friction so the other party can't keep delaying. Companion to the mom house carrying-the-load posture.

Open questions

  • Who is Dave? Worth checking 2021–2022 friend mentions for surname.
  • What was the Gavin situation? (Drug-related? Conflict mediation?)
  • Did the meeting actually happen?

Related

  • grants pass or
  • feel your emotions
  • grants pass teen era
  • yahir family
